claim: No hipBLASLt baseline timing is claimed. After adding the bundled ROCm SDK include path and updating the harness for hipBLASLt header naming, the hipBLASLt HGEMM harness compiles but remains link-blocked in the Windows ROCm venv because hipblasLt.lib is unavailable.
expected_profiler_signals: hipBLASLt algorithm metadata after the baseline links
library GFLOP/s for the same layout and dtype contract
curation_note: link-blocked: keep this as dependency evidence only. Install or expose a MSVC-compatible hipBLASLt import library, or use a ROCm package/link mode that supports hipBLASLt, before comparing rocWMMA, Composable Kernel, or custom MFMA kernels against this library baseline.
